subtitle.en: Family, relationships, counting, and handling everyday transactions.

milestone.en: Can describe family members, count up to a hundred, give and understand prices, and handle simple till transactions.

vocabulary.note: Number words you can't reduce to digits (eerste, tweede, helft, ...).
Useful for birth dates and dates in general.

grammar.note: Diminutives are EVERYWHERE in Belgian Dutch and they're always 'het' — get the rule once and it sticks.
Introduce; full mastery isn't expected yet.
